Glue without collisions of curly braces

Source: R/utils.R
GlueEscaped.Rd

Glue without collisions of curly braces

Usage

GlueEscaped(
  ...,
  .sep = "\n\n",
  .open = "qcthatopen{",
  .close = "}qcthatclose",
  .envir = rlang::caller_env()
)

Arguments

...

Values to glue and/or additional arguments passed to glue::glue().

.sep

(length-1 character) Separator to use between glued values.

.open

(length-1 character) Opening delimiter. Defaults value avoids collisions.

.close

(length-1 character) Closing delimiter. Defaults value avoids collisions.

.envir

(environment) Environment to evaluate expressions in.

Value

The glued expression as a length-1 character vector.

On this page
